instruction: Reply to Dana Lewis at Northwest Auto Review about the contributor invitation. Tell her I'd be glad to do it, I can send a short bio and three topic ideas, and I'd like to focus on diagnostics, transmission troubleshooting, and metal fabrication. Also ask what word count and monthly deadline she has in mind.

rule_ref.rule_text: For formal outreach, shop proposals, or mentorship messages, he prefers to draft the message first instead of sending it immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For anything formal or important, I like to see it as a draft before it goes out.

attributes.subject: Contributor invitation: repair-techniques column
attributes.body: Hi Charlie, I'm the editor at Northwest Auto Review. We're lining up contributors for a regular column on innovative repair techniques and custom fabrication, and your shop's work came up more than once. If you're interested, send over a short bio, a few topic ideas, and a sense of your availability for a monthly piece. We also feature one build photo with each contributor profile.

attributes.subject: Brake rotor backorder update
attributes.body: The rotors for the silver Tacoma won't arrive until Friday. Let me know if you want a substitute brand pulled from the regional warehouse.

attributes.subject: Barbecue at my place
attributes.body: You still coming by Sunday afternoon? Bring that photo of the chopped pickup if you can.
